injection_points.name: UserCode.swift
injection_points.description: Primary injection target. AI-generated Swift code is written here. Must compile standalone.

injection_contract.description: The injected code MUST define a class `UserCode` with a static method `run(completion:)`. The flow runner will call this method. If no such method exists, the flow will instantiate the class for side-effects and wait for timeout.
injection_contract.fallback_behavior: If no run(completion:) method is found, the flow will instantiate UserCode and wait for timeout.

run_generated.description: Generic flow: instantiates the injected UserCode class, calls its run(completion:) method, and waits for completion or timeout.
